verses.t: In the eighth month of the second year of Dareyawesh, the Word of HWHY came to Zeḵaryah son of Bereḵyah, son of Iddo the naḇi, saying,
“HWHY was very wroth with your fathers.
“And you shall say to them, ‘Thus said HWHY of hosts, “Turn back to Me,” declares HWHY of hosts, “and I shall turn back to you,” declares HWHY of hosts.

“Do not be like your fathers, to whom the former neḇi'im proclaimed, saying, ‘Thus said HWHY of hosts, “Turn back now from your evil ways and your evil deeds.” ’ But they did not obey or give heed to Me,” declares HWHY.
“Your fathers, where are they? And the neḇi'im, do they live forever?

“But My words and My laws, which I commanded My servants the neḇi'im, did they not overtake your fathers?” “Then they turned back and said, ‘As HWHY of hosts planned to do to us, according to our ways and according to our deeds, so He has done with us.’ ” ’ ”
On the twenty-fourth day of the Aleventh month, which is the month Sheḇat, in the second year of Dareyawesh, the Word of HWHY came to Zeḵaryah son of Bereḵyahu, son of Iddo the naḇi, saying,
“I looked at night and saw a man riding on a red horse and he was standing among the myrtle trees in the shade. And behind him were horses: red, sorrel and white.”
And I said, “My master, what are these?” And the mal'ak who was speaking to me said to me, “Let me show you what they are.”
And the man who stood among the myrtle trees answered and said, “They are the ones HWHY has sent to go throughout the earth.”
And they answered the mal'ak of HWHY, who stood among the myrtle trees and said, “We have gone throughout the earth and see, all the earth is at peace and rest.”
And the mal'ak of HWHY answered and said, “O HWHY of hosts, how long would You have no compassion on Yerushalayim and on the cities of Yahuḏah, against which You were enraged these seventy years?”
And HWHY answered the mal'ak who talked to me, good words, comforting words.
And the mal'ak who spoke with me said to me, “Proclaim, saying, ‘Thus said HWHY of hosts, “I have been jealous for Yerushalayim and for Tsiyon with great jealousy.
“And I am very wroth with the nations who are at ease, for when I was a little wroth, they furthered the evil!”
‘Therefore thus said HWHY, “I shall return to Yerushalayim with compassion. My house shall be built in it,” declares HWHY of hosts, “and a surveyor’s line be stretched out over Yerushalayim.” ’
“Again proclaim, saying, ‘Thus said HWHY of hosts, “Again My cities shall overflow with goodness. And HWHY shall again comfort Tsiyon and shall again choose Yerushalayim.” ’ ”
And I lifted up my eyes and looked and saw four horns.
And I said to the mal'ak who was speaking to me, “What are these?” And he said to me, “These are the horns that have scattered Yahuḏah, Yasharal and Yerushalayim.”
And HWHY showed me four craftsmen.

And I said, “What are these coming to do?” And he spoke saying, “These are the horns that scattered Yahuḏah, so that no one lifted up his head. But these come to trouble them, to throw down the horns of the gentiles that lifted up their horn against the land of Yahuḏah to scatter it.”
And I lifted up my eyes and looked and saw a man with a measuring line in his hand.
And I said, “Where are you going?” And he said to me, “To measure Yerushalayim, to see what is its width and what is its length.”
And see, the mal'ak who was speaking to me was going out. And another mal'ak was coming out to meet him,
and he said to him, “Run, speak to this young man, saying, ‘Yerushalayim is to remain unwalled, because of the many men and livestock in it.
‘For I Myself am to her,’ declares HWHY, ‘a wall of fire all around and for esteem I am in her midst.’ ”
“Oh, Oh! And flee from the land of the north,” declares HWHY, “for I have scattered you like the four winds of the shamayim,” declares HWHY.
“Oh, Tsiyon! Escape, you who dwell with the daughter of Baḇel.”
For thus said HWHY of hosts (for the sake of esteem He sent me to the gentiles which plunder you): “For he who touches you touches the apple of My eye.
“For look, I am waving My hand against them and they shall become spoil for their servants. And you shall know that HWHY of hosts has sent Me.
“Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Tsiyon! For look, I am coming and shall dwell in your midst,” declares HWHY.
“And many gentiles shall be joined to HWHY in that day and they shall become My people. And I shall dwell in your midst. And you shall know that HWHY of hosts has sent Me to you.
“And HWHY shall inherit Yahuḏah, His portion in the Set-apart Land. And He shall again choose Yerushalayim.
“Hush, all flesh, before HWHY, for He has roused Himself out of His set- apart dwelling.
And he showed me Yahusha the kohen gadol standing before the mal'ak of HWHY and Satan standing at his right hand to be an adversary to him.
And HWHY said to Satan, “HWHY rebuke you, Satan! HWHY who has chosen Yerushalayim rebuke you! Is this not a brand plucked from the fire?”
And Yahusha was dressed in filthy garments and was standing before the mal'ak.

And He answered and spoke to those who stood before Him, saying, “Remove the filthy garments from him.” And to him He said, “See, I have removed your guilt from you and shall put costly robes on you.”
And I said, “Let them put a clean turban on his head.” Then they put a clean turban on his head and they put garments on him. And the mal'ak of HWHY stood by.
And the mal'ak of HWHY witnessed to Yahusha, saying,
“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘If you walk in My ways and if you guard My duty, then you shall also rule My house and also guard My courts. And I shall give you access among these standing here.
‘Now listen, Yahusha the kohen gadol, you and your companions who sit before you, for they are men of symbol. For look, I am bringing forth My Servant – the Branch.
‘See the stone which I have put before Yahusha: on one stone are seven eyes. See, I am engraving its inscription,’ declares HWHY of hosts, ‘and I shall remove the guilt of that land in one day.
‘In that day,’ declares HWHY of hosts, ‘you shall invite one another, under the vine and under the fig tree.’ ”
And the mal'ak who was speaking to me came back and woke me up as a man is awakened from sleep.
And he said to me, “What do you see?” So I said, “I have looked and see: a lampstand all of gold with a bowl on top of it and on the stand seven lamps with seven spouts to the seven lamps.
“And two olive trees are by it, one at the right of the bowl and the other at its left.”
Then I responded and spoke to the mal'ak who was speaking to me, saying, “What are these, my Master?”
And the mal'ak who was speaking to me answered and said to me, “Do you not know what these are?” And I said, “No, my Master.”
And he answered and said to me, “This is the Word of HWHY to Zerubbaḇel, ‘Not by might nor by power, but by My Ruach,’ said HWHY of hosts.
‘Who are you, great mountain, before Zerubbaḇel? A plain! And he shall bring forth the capstone with shouts of “Favour, favour to it!” ’ ”
And the Word of HWHY came to me, saying,
“The hands of Zerubbaḇel have laid the foundation of this House and his hands shall complete it. And you shall know that HWHY of hosts has sent Me to you.

“For who has despised the day of small beginnings? They shall rejoice when they see the plumb-line in the hand of Zerubbaḇel. These seven are the eyes of HWHY, which diligently search throughout all the earth.”
Then I responded and said to him, “What are these two olive trees, one at the right of the lampstand and the other at its left?”
And I responded a second time and said to him, “What are these two olive branches which empty golden oil from themselves by means of the two gold pipes?”
And he answered me and said, “Do you not know what these are?” And I said, “No, my Master.”
And he said, “These are the two anointed ones, who stand beside the Master of all the earth.”
And I lifted up my eyes again and looked and saw a flying scroll.
And he said to me, “What do you see?” And I answered, “I see a flying scroll, twenty cubits long and ten cubits wide.”

And he said to me, “This is the curse that goes forth over the face of all the earth: ‘everyone who is stealing shall go unpunished,’ on the one side, according to it, and, ‘everyone who has sworn falsely shall go unpunished,’ on the other side, according to it.”

“I shall send it out,” declares HWHY of hosts, “and it shall come into the house of the thief and the house of the one who shall swear falsely by My Name. And it shall remain in the midst of his house and shall consume it, both its timber and stones.”
And the mal'ak who was speaking with me came out and said to me, “Lift up your eyes now and see what this is that is going forth.”
And I said, “What is it?” And he said, “It is an ĕphah-measure that is going forth.” Again he said, “This is their appearance throughout the earth:
“And see, a lead cover lifted up and this: a woman sitting inside the ĕphahmeasure!”
And he said, “This is Wrongness!” And he threw her down into the ĕphah- measure and threw the lead weight over its mouth.

And I lifted up my eyes and looked and saw two women, coming with the wind in their wings. And they had wings like the wings of a stork and they lifted up the ĕphah-measure between earth and the shamayim.
Then I said to the mal'ak who was speaking to me, “Where are they taking the ĕphah-measure?”
And he said to me, “To build a house for it in the land of Shin‛ar. And it shall be established and set there on its own base.”
And I lifted up my eyes again and looked and saw four chariots coming from between two mountains and the mountains were mountains of bronze.
With the first chariot were red horses and with the second chariot black horses,
and with the third chariot white horses and with the fourth chariot strong speckled horses.
So I responded and said to the mal'ak who was speaking to me, “What are these, my Master?”
And the mal'ak answered and said to me, “These are four ruchot of the shamayim, coming forth from presenting themselves before the Master of all the earth.
“The one with the black horses is going out to the land of the north and the white ones have gone out after them and the speckled ones have gone out to the land of the south.”
And the strong ones went out, eager to go, to walk to and fro in the earth. And He said, “Go, walk to and fro in the earth.” So they walked to and fro in the earth.
And He called to me and spoke to me, saying, “See, those who go toward the land of the north have given rest to My Ruach in the land of the north.”
And the Word of HWHY came to me, saying,
“Receive the gift from the exiles, from Ḥeldai, Toḇiyah and Yeḏayah, who have come from Baḇel. Then you shall go the same day and enter the house of Yoshiyah son of Tsephanyah.
“And you shall take the silver and gold, make a crown and set it on the head of Yahusha the son of Yehotsaḏaq, the kohen gadol,
and shall speak to him, saying, ‘Thus said HWHY of hosts, saying, “See, the Man whose Name is the Branch! And from His place He shall branch out and He shall build the Hĕḵal of HWHY.

“It is He who is going to build the Hĕḵal of HWHY. It is He who is going to bear the splendour. And He shall sit and rule on His throne and shall be a kohen on His throne and the counsel of peace shall be between Them both,” ’
while the crown is for a remembrance in the Hĕḵal of HWHY to Ḥĕlem and to Toḇiyah and to Yeḏayah and to Ḥĕn son of Tsephanyah.

“And those who are far away shall come and build the Hĕḵal of HWHY. And you shall know that HWHY of hosts has sent Me to you. And this shall be, if you diligently obey the voice of HWHY your Aluahim.”
And in the fourth year of Sovereign Dareyawesh it came to be that the word of HWHY came to Zeḵaryah, on the fourth of the ninth month, Kislĕw.
Now Bĕyth Al had sent Shar’etser, with Reḡem-Meleḵ and his men, to pray before HWHY,
speaking to the kohanim who belonged to the House of HWHY of hosts and to the neḇi'im, saying, “Should I weep in the fifth month and fast as I have done for so many years?”
Then the Word of HWHY of hosts came to me, saying,
“Speak to all the people of the land and to the kohanim, saying, ‘When you fasted and lamented in the fifth and seventh months all these seventy years, did you truly fast for Me – for Me?
‘And when you ate and when you drank, was it not for those eating and for those drinking?
‘Are these not the words which HWHY proclaimed through the former neḇi'im when Yerushalayim and the cities around it were inhabited and in safety and the South and the low country were inhabited?’ ”
And the Word of HWHY came to Zeḵaryah, saying,
“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘Execute true right-ruling, show kindness and compassion everyone to his brother.
“Do not oppress the widow or the fatherless, the stranger or the poor. And do not plot evil in your hearts against one another.’
“But they refused to listen and they shrugged their shoulders and stopped their ears from hearing.
“And they made their hearts like flint against hearing the Torah and the words, which HWHY of hosts had sent by His Ruach through the former neḇi'im. Therefore great wrath came from HWHY of hosts.
“And it came to be: as He called and they did not hear, so let them call, but I shall not hear,” said HWHY of hosts.

“And I scattered them with a storm wind among all the gentiles which they had not known. And the land was laid waste behind them, no one passing through or returning, for they made the pleasant land a waste.”
And the Word of HWHY of hosts came, saying,
“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘I shall be jealous for Tsiyon with great jealousy, with great wrath I shall be jealous for her.’

“Thus said HWHY, ‘I shall return to Tsiyon and I shall dwell in the midst of Yerushalayim. And Yerushalayim shall be called: City of the Truth and the Mountain of HWHY of hosts, the Set- apart Mountain.’
“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘Again old men and old women shall dwell in the streets of Yerushalayim, each one with his staff in his hand because of great age,
and the streets of the city shall be filled with boys and girls playing in its streets.’
“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘If it is marvellous in the eyes of the remnant of this people in these days, should it also be marvellous in My eyes?’ declares HWHY of hosts.
“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘See, I am saving My people from the land of the sunrise and from the land of the sunset.
‘And I shall bring them back and they shall dwell in the midst of Yerushalayim. And they shall be My people and I shall be their Aluahim, in truth and in righteousness.’

“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘Let your hands be strong, you who are listening in these days to these words, from the mouth of the neḇi'im, of the day the foundation was laid for the House of HWHY of hosts, the Hĕḵal that was to be rebuilt.
‘For before these days there was not a wage for a man, nor a hire for beast and there was no peace for him who went out or came in, because of his enemies and I set all men one against another.
‘But now I am not as in the former days to the remnant of this people,’ declares HWHY of hosts.
‘Because of the sowing of peace the vine does give its fruit, the ground does give her increase and the shamayim do give their dew. And I shall cause the remnant of this people to inherit all these.
‘And it shall be, as you were a curse among the gentiles, O house of Yahuḏah and house of Yasharal, so I shall save you and you shall be a berakah. Do not fear, let your hands be strong.’
“For thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘As I purposed to do evil to you when your fathers provoked Me,’ declares HWHY of hosts, ‘and I did not relent,
so again in these days I have purposed to do good to Yerushalayim and to the house of Yahuḏah. Do not fear!
‘These are the words you should do: speak the truth to one another, judge with truth and right-ruling for peace in your gates.
‘And do not plot evil in your heart against another and do not love a false oath. For all these I hate,’ declares HWHY.”
And the Word of HWHY of hosts came to me, saying,

“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘The fast of the fourth and the fast of the fifth and the fast of the seventh and the fast of the tenth months, are to be joy and gladness and pleasant appointed times for the house of Yahuḏah – and they shall love the truth and the peace.’
“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘Peoples shall yet come, inhabitants of many cities,
and the inhabitants of the one go to another, saying, “Let us earnestly go and pray before HWHY and seek HWHY of hosts. I myself am going.”
‘And many peoples and strong nations shall come to seek HWHY of hosts in Yerushalayim and to pray before HWHY.’

“Thus said HWHY of hosts, ‘In those days ten men from all languages of the nations take hold, yea, they shall take hold of the edge of the garment of a man, a Yehuḏite, saying, “Let us go with you, for we have heard that Aluahim is with you .” ’ ”
The message of the Word of HWHY against the land of Ḥaḏraḵ and Damascus its resting place – when the eye of man and all the tribes of Yasharal are on HWHY–
and Ḥamath also borders on it, Tsor and Tsiḏon, though they are very wise.
For Tsor built herself a tower, heaped up silver like the dust and gold like the mud of the streets.
See, HWHY shall dispossess her and He shall destroy her power in the sea and she shall be consumed by fire.
Ashqelon sees it and fears, Azzah too, writhing in anguish and Eqron, for her expectation has dried up. And the sovereign shall perish from Azzah and Ashqelon shall not be inhabited.
“And a half-breed shall settle in Ashdoḏ. So I shall cut off the pride of the Philistines,

and shall take away his blood from his mouth and the abominations from between his teeth. And he shall remain, even he, to our Aluahim and he shall be like a leader in Yahuḏah and Eqron like a Yeḇusite.
And I shall encamp around My house, against an army, against him who passes by and him who returns, so that no oppressor passes through them again, for now I have seen with My eyes.

“Rejoice greatly, O daughter of Tsiyon! Shout, O daughter of Yerushalayim! See, your Sovereign is coming to you, He is righteous and endowed with deliverance, humble and riding on a donkey, a colt, the foal of a donkey.

“And I shall cut off the chariot from Ephrayim and the horse from Yerushalayim. And the battle bow shall be cut off. And He shall speak peace to the nations and His rule is from sea to sea and from the River to the ends of the earth.
“Also you, because of the blood of your berith, I shall send your prisoners out of the pit.
“Return to the stronghold, you prisoners of the expectation. Even today I declare that I return double to you.
“For I shall bend Yahuḏah for Me, I shall fill the bow with Ephrayim and I shall stir up your sons, O Tsiyon, against your sons, O Greece and I shall make you like the sword of a mighty man.”
And HWHY shall appear for them and His arrow go forth like lightning and the Master HWHY sound the ram’s horn. And He shall go with whirlwinds from the south,
HWHY of hosts shall shield them. And they shall devour and trample on sling stones. And they shall drink, roar as if with wine and they shall be filled like basins, like the corners of the mizbe'ach.
And HWHY their Aluahim shall save them in that day, as the flock of His people, for the stones of a diadem, sparkling over His land.
For what goodness is His and what comeliness is His. Grain make the young men thrive and new wine the maidens!

For the household idols spoke emptiness, the diviners saw falsehood and relate dreams of deceit, they comfort in vain. Therefore they have wandered about like sheep. They are afflicted, for there is no shepherd.
“My wrath burns against the shepherds and I lay a charge against the leaders. For HWHY of hosts shall visit His flock, the house of Yahuḏah and make them like His splendid horse in battle.
“From him comes the corner-stone, from him the tent peg, from him the battle bow, from him every ruler, together.
“And they shall be like mighty men, who trample down the mud of the streets in the battle. And they shall fight because HWHY is with them and the riders on horses shall be put to shame.

“And I shall make the house of Yahuḏah mighty and save the house of Yosĕph. And I shall bring them back, because I have compassion on them. And they shall be as though I had not pushed them aside. For I am HWHY their Aluahim and I answer them.
“And Ephrayim shall be as a mighty man and their heart shall rejoice as if with wine. And their children shall see and rejoice, their heart exulting in HWHY.
“I shall whistle for them and gather them, for I shall ransom them. And they shall increase as they once increased.
“Though I sow them among peoples, they shall remember Me in places far away. And they shall live, together with their children and they shall return.
“And I shall bring them back from the land of Mitsrayim and gather them from Ashshur and bring them into the land of Gil‛aḏ and Leḇanon, until no more room is found for them.

“And He shall pass through the sea of distress and strike the waves of the sea and all the depths of the River shall dry up. And the pride of Ashshur shall be brought down and the sceptre of Mitsrayim be taken away.
“And I shall make them mighty in HWHY, so that they walk up and down in His Name,” declares HWHY.

For the household idols spoke emptiness, the diviners saw falsehood and relate dreams of deceit, they comfort in vain. Therefore they have wandered about like sheep. They are afflicted, for there is no shepherd.
“My wrath burns against the shepherds and I lay a charge against the leaders. For HWHY of hosts shall visit His flock, the house of Yahuḏah and make them like His splendid horse in battle.
“From him comes the corner-stone, from him the tent peg, from him the battle bow, from him every ruler, together.
“And they shall be like mighty men, who trample down the mud of the streets in the battle. And they shall fight because HWHY is with them and the riders on horses shall be put to shame.

“And I shall make the house of Yahuḏah mighty and save the house of Yosĕph. And I shall bring them back, because I have compassion on them. And they shall be as though I had not pushed them aside. For I am HWHY their Aluahim and I answer them.
“And Ephrayim shall be as a mighty man and their heart shall rejoice as if with wine. And their children shall see and rejoice, their heart exulting in HWHY.
“I shall whistle for them and gather them, for I shall ransom them. And they shall increase as they once increased.
“Though I sow them among peoples, they shall remember Me in places far away. And they shall live, together with their children and they shall return.
“And I shall bring them back from the land of Mitsrayim and gather them from Ashshur and bring them into the land of Gil‛aḏ and Leḇanon, until no more room is found for them.

“And He shall pass through the sea of distress and strike the waves of the sea and all the depths of the River shall dry up. And the pride of Ashshur shall be brought down and the sceptre of Mitsrayim be taken away.
“And I shall make them mighty in HWHY, so that they walk up and down in His Name,” declares HWHY.
And HWHY said to me, “Throw it to the potter,” the splendid price at which I was valued by them. And I took the thirty pieces of silver and threw them into the House of HWHY for the potter.
Then I cut in two my other staff, Unity, to break the brotherhood between Yahuḏah and Yasharal.
And HWHY said to me, “Take again the implements of a foolish shepherd.

“For look, I am raising up a shepherd in the land who does not visit those straying, nor seek the young, nor heal those that are broken, nor feed those that still stand. But he does eat the flesh of the fat and tear off their hooves.
“Woe to the worthless shepherd forsaking the flock! Let a sword be upon his arm and upon his right eye! His arm shall wither and his right eye shall be dimmed.”
The message of the Word of HWHY against Yasharal. HWHY, stretching out the shamayim and laying the foundation of the earth and forming the ruach of man within him, declares,
“See, I am making Yerushalayim a cup of reeling to all the people all around and also against Yahuḏah it is in the siege against Yerushalayim.
“And in that day it shall be that I make Yerushalayim a very heavy stone for all peoples – all lifting it are severely injured. And all the nations of the earth shall be gathered against it.
“In that day,” declares HWHY, “I smite every horse with bewilderment and its rider with madness. And on the house of Yahuḏah I open My eyes, but every horse of the peoples I smite with blindness.
“And the leaders of Yahuḏah shall say in their heart, ‘The inhabitants of Yerushalayim are a strength to me, through HWHY of hosts, their Aluahim.’

“In that day I make the leaders of Yahuḏah like a fire pot among trees and like a torch of fire in the sheaves. And they shall consume all the peoples all around, on the right and on the left. And Yerushalayim shall dwell again in her own place, in Yerushalayim.
“And HWHY shall save the tents of Yahuḏah first, so that the comeliness of the house of Dawiḏ and the comeliness of the inhabitants of Yerushalayim would not become greater than that of Yahuḏah.
“In that day HWHY shall shield the inhabitants of Yerushalayim. And the feeble among them in that day shall be like Dawiḏ and the house of Dawiḏ like Aluahim, like the Mal'ak of HWHY before them!
“And it shall be in that day that I seek to destroy all the gentiles that come against Yerushalayim.

“And I shall pour on the house of Dawiḏ and on the inhabitants of Yerushalayim a ruach of favour and prayers. They shall look on Me whom they pierced and they shall mourn for Him as one mourns for his only son. And they shall be in bitterness over Him as a bitterness over the first-born.
“In that day the mourning in Yerushalayim is going to be great, like the mourning at Haḏaḏ Rimmon in the valley of Meḡiddo.
“And the land shall mourn, every clan by itself: the clan of the house of Dawiḏ by itself and their women by themselves; the clan of the house of Nathan by itself and their women by themselves;
the clan of the house of Lĕwi by itself and their women by themselves; the clan of Shim‛i by itself and their women by themselves;
all the rest of the clans, every clan by itself and their women by themselves.
“In that day a fountain shall be opened for the house of Dawiḏ and for the inhabitants of Yerushalayim, for sin and for uncleanness.

“And it shall be in that day,” declares HWHY of hosts, “that I cut off the names of the idols from the earth, and they shall be remembered no more and I shall also remove the neḇi'im and the unclean ruach from the earth.

“And it shall be, when one prophesies again, then his father and mother who brought him forth shall say to him, ‘You shall not to live, because you have spoken falsehood in the Name of HWHY.’ And his father and mother who brought him forth shall pierce him through when he prophesies.
“And it shall be in that day that the neḇi'im shall be ashamed, everyone of his vision when he prophesies and not put a hairy robe on in order to deceive,
but shall say, ‘I am no naḇi, I am a farmer, for a man sold me as a slave in my youth.’
“And one shall say to him, ‘What are these wounds in your hands?’ And he shall say, ‘Because I was wounded at home by those who love me.’
“O sword, awake against My Shepherd, against the Man who is My Companion,” declares HWHY of hosts. “Smite the Shepherd and let the sheep be scattered. But I shall turn My hand upon the little ones.
And it shall be throughout all the soil,” declares HWHY, “that two-thirds there in are cut off and die and one-third is left therein.

“And I shall bring the third into fire and refine them as silver is refined and try them as gold is tried. They shall call on My Name and I shall answer them. I shall say, ‘This is My people,’ while they say, ‘HWHY is my Aluahim.’ ”
See, a day shall come for HWHY and your spoil shall be divided in your midst.

And I shall gather all the gentiles to battle against Yerushalayim. And the city shall be taken, the houses plundered and the women ravished. Half of the city shall go into exile, but the remnant of the people shall not be cut off from the city.
And HWHY shall go forth and He shall fight against those gentiles, as He fights in the day of battle.

And in that day His feet shall stand upon the Mount of Olives, which faces Yerushalayim on the east. And the Mount of Olives shall be split in two, from east to west, a very great valley and half of the mountain shall move toward the north and half of it toward the south.

And you shall flee to the valley of My mountain – for the valley of the mountains reaches to Atsal. And you shall flee as you fled from the earthquake in the days of Uzziyah sovereign of Yahuḏah. And HWHY my Aluahim shall come – all the set-apart ones with You.
And in that day it shall be: there is no light, it is dark.
And it shall be one day which is known to HWHY, neither day nor night, but at evening time there shall be light.
And in that day it shall be that living waters flow from Yerushalayim, half of them toward the eastern sea and half of them toward the western sea, in summer as well as in winter.
And HWHY shall be Sovereign over all the earth. In that day there shall be one HWHY and His Name one.

All the land shall be changed into a desert plain from Geḇa to Rimmon south of Yerushalayim and she shall be raised up and inhabited in her place from Binyamin’s Gate to the place of the First Gate and the Corner Gate and from the the mizbe'ach. Tower of Ḥanan’Al to the winepresses of

And they shall dwell in her and there hosts. And all those who slaughter shall shall be no more utter destruction, but come and take them and cook in them. Yerushalayim shall be safely inhabited. And there shall no longer be a merchant

And this is the plague with which in the House of HWHY of hosts, in that HWHY plagues all the people who day. fought against Yerushalayim: their flesh shall decay while they stand on their feet and their eyes decay in their sockets and their tongues decay in their mouths.
And it shall be in that day that a great confusion from HWHY is among them and everyone of them shall seize the hand of his neighbour and his hand rise up against his neighbour’s hand.
And Yahuḏah shall fight at Yerushalayim as well. And the wealth of all the gentiles round about shall be gathered together: gold and silver and garments in great quantities.
So also is the plague on the horse and the mule, on the camel and the donkey and on all the cattle that are in those camps – as this plague.

And it shall be that all who are left from all the gentiles which came up against Yerushalayim, shall go up from year to year to bow themselves to the Sovereign, HWHY of hosts and to observe the Festival of Booths.
And it shall be, that if anyone of the clans of the earth does not come up to Yerushalayim to bow himself to the Sovereign, HWHY of hosts, on them there is to be no rain.
And if the clan of Mitsrayim does not come up and enter in, then there is no rain. On them is the plague with which HWHY plagues the gentiles who do not come up to observe the Festival of Booths.
This is the punishment of Mitsrayim and the punishment of all the gentiles that do not come up to observe the Festival of Booths.
In that day:“SET-APART TO HWHY” shall be engraved on the bells of the horses. And the pots in the House of HWHY shall be like the bowls before
